headline: NASA Eyes Boeing-Lockheed Rocket Component For Moon Mission As Costs Skyrocket: Report
summary: NASA is reportedly seeking rocket components from Boeing Co. and Lockheed Martin Corp's joint venture, the United Launch Alliance (ULA). Costs Ballooned In a report by Bloomberg on Wednesday, it was said that the Exploration Upper Stage of the agency's Space Launch System, which has been built by Boeing, has been plagued by delays and costs ballooning to over $2.8 billion. headline: Lockheed Martin Goes Full Throttle On Weapons Production— Commits To 4X Output After Trump Meeting
summary: Lockheed Martin said it will quadruple munitions production following talks with Donald Trump and other defense leaders, citing the need to expand U.S. military capacity.
